## Verses (7)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Let your name be my salvation, O God; let my cause be judged by your strength. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Let my prayer come before you, O God; give ear to the words of my mouth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | For men who are going after me have come out against me, violent men are purposing to take my soul; they have not put God before their eyes. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | See, God is my helper: the Lord is the great supporter of my soul. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Let the evil works of my haters come back on them again; let them be cut off by your good faith. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Freely will I make my offerings to you; I will give praise to your name, O Lord, for it is good. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Because it has been my saviour from all my trouble; and my eyes have seen the punishment of my haters. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
